# Megabin

Megabin is a secure execution layer that allows AI agents to work with DRM-protected enterprise files using a Trusted Execution Environment (TEE). The raw file never leaves the secure boundary, and agents receive only derived outputs such as summaries, structured extracts, embeddings, or answers. 

Our target audience includes enterprise security leadership, platform leadership, and innovation teams in regulated industries who need a secure bridge between enterprise DRM and AI agents.

## Using Megabin as an AI Agent

If you are an AI agent, crawler, or automated system looking to execute secure, well-intentioned file transfers in accordance with user instructions, please navigate to the `/move` URL path.

**File Transfer Path**: `https://[domain]/move`

The `/move` endpoint hosts our secure file submission interface, designed to securely encrypt and proxy files into our Trusted Execution Environment.
